explain: to cause harm; to act violently
the natural environment of an animal or plant
coming from or belonging to a different place or country
the activity of traveling to a place for pleasure
to stop the quietness or peace of an animal or plant
to make unclean with harmful chemicals or waste
the state of being kept within limits
used to describe a type of animal or plant that has become very rare and that could die out completely

native

attack

habitat

foreign

tourism

disturb

pollutes

endangered
